title: WCP Route Decision
description: The Hall's routing decision in response to a RouteInput (WCP §5)

worker_id.description: Worker assigned (only present when outcome is DISPATCH)

deny_code.description: Deny reason code (only present when outcome is DENY). E.g. DENY_NO_WORKER, DENY_POLICY_BLOCK

controls_applied.description: Control IDs that were applied to this decision

correlation_id.description: Same as RouteInput.correlation_id — links request to decision
